name: Willow Biosciences Inc.
description: Willow Biosciences Inc. is a Canadian biotechnology company that develops and produces precision fermented functional ingredients for various industries, including health and wellness, food and beverage, and personal care. By leveraging a proprietary yeast-based platform, the company engineers strains to create high-purity, sustainable alternatives to traditional plant-derived ingredients. Willow Biosciences focuses on optimizing fermentation processes and downstream purification to provide scalable, commercially viable solutions for its partners, aiming to address supply chain challenges and quality variability in the global market for specialty ingredients.
